'''dhapuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olaratumab|olaratumab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olaratumab|olaratumab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhapuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæpihith|dhæpihith]] || [[word:dhæpihij|dhæpihij]] || [[word:dhæpihish|dhæpihish]] || [[word:dhæpihi|dhæpihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapupuhuth|dhapupuhuth]] || [[word:dhapupuhuj|dhapupuhuj]] || [[word:dhapupuhush|dhapupuhush]] || [[word:dhapupuhu|dhapupuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapuhuth|dhapuhuth]] || [[word:dhapuhuj|dhapuhuj]] || [[word:dhapuhush|dhapuhush]] || [[word:dhapuhu|dhapuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapufhufth|dhapufhufth]] || [[word:dhapufhufj|dhapufhufj]] || [[word:dhapufhufsh|dhapufhufsh]] || [[word:dhapufhuf|dhapufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhapuhuthu|dhapuhuthu]] || [[word:dhapuhuju|dhapuhuju]] || [[word:dhapuhushu|dhapuhushu]] || [[word:dhapuhuku|dhapuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhapuhuth|dhapuhuth]] || [[word:dhapuhuj|dhapuhuj]] || [[word:dhapuhush|dhapuhush]] || [[word:dhapuhu|dhapuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhapuhuthul|dhapuhuthul]] || [[word:dhapuhujul|dhapuhujul]] || [[word:dhapuhushul|dhapuhushul]] || [[word:dhapuhukul|dhapuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhapuhuuthuthu|dhapuhuuthuthu]] || [[word:dhapuhuujuju|dhapuhuujuju]] || [[word:dhapuhuushushu|dhapuhuushushu]] || [[word:dhapuhuuku|dhapuhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhapuhuthun|dhapuhuthun]] || [[word:dhapuhujun|dhapuhujun]] || [[word:dhapuhushun|dhapuhushun]] || [[word:dhapuhukun|dhapuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhapuhuthuoro|dhapuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhapuhujuoro|dhapuhujuoro]] || [[word:dhapuhushuoro|dhapuhushuoro]] || [[word:dhapuhukuoro|dhapuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
